verses.text: The priests and Levites have no inheritance but the LORD. Their portion. God Himself is their wealth.
The priests and Levites have no inheritance but the LORD. Their portion. God Himself is their wealth.
The people give them their due of the offerings. Dues. Care for God's ministers.
The people give them their due of the offerings. Dues. Care for God's ministers.
The people give them their due of the offerings. Dues. Care for God's ministers.
A Levite may come and serve, sharing alike with the rest. Equal. All serve before God.
A Levite may come and serve, sharing alike with the rest. Equal. All serve before God.
A Levite may come and serve, sharing alike with the rest. Equal. All serve before God.
Do not learn the abominations of the nations — witchcraft and divination. Abominations. Occult arts are forbidden.
Do not learn the abominations of the nations — witchcraft and divination. Abominations. Occult arts are forbidden.
Do not learn the abominations of the nations — witchcraft and divination. Abominations. Occult arts are forbidden.
Do not learn the abominations of the nations — witchcraft and divination. Abominations. Occult arts are forbidden.
Be perfect with the LORD, not like the nations. Perfect. Trust God, not omens.
Be perfect with the LORD, not like the nations. Perfect. Trust God, not omens.
'The LORD... will raise up unto thee a Prophet... like unto me.' The Prophet. A word of Christ to come.
'The LORD... will raise up unto thee a Prophet... like unto me.' The Prophet. A word of Christ to come.
'The LORD... will raise up unto thee a Prophet... like unto me.' The Prophet. A word of Christ to come.
'The LORD... will raise up unto thee a Prophet... like unto me.' The Prophet. A word of Christ to come.
'The LORD... will raise up unto thee a Prophet... like unto me.' The Prophet. A word of Christ to come.
The false prophet who presumes shall die; test by fulfilment. Test. God's word always comes to pass.
